title: Use UNMERGED vbauerster/mpb PR to fix a pull deadlock
body:
```
go mod edit -replace github.com/vbauerster/mpb/v7=github.com/mtrmac/mpb/v7@abort-deadlock
make vendor
```

See https://github.com/vbauerster/mpb/issues/100 and https://github.com/vbauerster/mpb/pull/101 .

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mtrmac*, *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [mtrmac,vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@mtrmac, can you rerun `make vendor`? CI isn't happy with it it seems.
